meta.title: How Russia stole the Sidewinder missile AGAIN
meta.description:
The incredible story of the AIM-9 Sidewinder missile continues with the 1967 theft of an AIM-9D from an air base in Germany. 

#short #shorts #airpower #fighterjets #sidewinder #missile #missiles #aim9 #aim9x
